text:
Market today: The ETF leverage headline is the real driver, especially for your concentrated tech/chip book. It's the elephant in the room.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL/TRIM candidate (-24.86%) given the leverage and decay concerns. SPAL is also concerning (-24.51%) for similar reasons. Both are leveraged ETFs and margin amplifies drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on the broader market sentiment and how the leverage theme plays out. Specifically, watch SK Hynix's performance after its Nasdaq debut.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and the overall market sentiment around leverage.
plays: SOXL: Trim/Sell. Given the -24.86% PnL and leverage/decay, consider reducing exposure.
SPAL: Trim/Sell. The -24.51% PnL on this leveraged ETF warrants attention.
Consider TQQQ: WATCH 76.92-76.84, stop 76.6. Scanner shows a Grade B long setup.
